DISCOUNT.MORE_FOR_LESS: Get budget-friendly packaged deals. Contact us for better price
DISCOUNT.TITLE: Wholesale / Car Dealer
DISCOUNT.DESC_1: Contact us to get to our budget-friendly packaged deals. Unlock low rates and access.
DISCOUNT.DESC_2: Unlock access history section to view and track all your past reports.
DISCOUNT.DESC_3: Intigrate us to you website, make additonal incom from car reports.

DEAL.INTRO: The Wholesale/Car Dealer program offers budget-friendly package deals with low rates and expanded access, including the ability to unlock and track your full report history. Dealers can also integrate the service directly into their website to generate additional income through car report offerings.
DEAL.MULTI_DEAL: Pay once and get KEY for access to multiple reports in one discounted package!

PRIVACY_POLICY.TITLE: Privacy Policy
PRIVACY_POLICY.CONFIRM_MSG: With the submission of this inquiry, I confirm that I have read and understood CarCroc Privacy Policy and I consent to my personal data being used for the purpose of processing this inquiry.
